hero.headline: Everything for your store, in one place
hero.subhead: KapiMart brings your catalog, orders, and customers together so you can spend less time switching tools and more time selling.

marketing.about: KapiMart is a storefront and order platform for small retailers. Connect your products, take payments, and ship orders from a single dashboard. Your AI assistant drafts product descriptions and answers customer questions while you stay in control of every word.

products.title: Products
products.empty: No products match your search yet.

cart.title: Your cart
cart.summary: {count, plural, one {# item in your cart} other {# items in your cart}}
cart.empty: Your cart is empty. Browse products to get started.

errors.network: We could not reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
errors.payment_failed: Your payment could not be processed. No charge was made.
